topics.label: SDLC Automation
topics.description: Design and implement CI/CD pipelines using AWS developer tools. Covers CodePipeline orchestration, CodeBuild environments, CodeDeploy deployment strategies (blue/green, canary, linear), CodeCommit branching, CodeArtifact package management, feature flags, and automated testing integration.

examScenarios.title: Lambda Canary Deployment
examScenarios.prompt: A team needs to shift 10% of Lambda traffic to a new version, monitor for 30 minutes, then complete the shift if no alarms fire. Which CodeDeploy configuration and hook should be used?
examScenarios.focus: LambdaCanary10Percent30Minutes deployment configuration with pre/post traffic hooks invoking CloudWatch alarm checks

examScenarios.title: Cross-Account Pipeline
examScenarios.prompt: A pipeline in account A must deploy to account B. How do you configure the CodePipeline IAM role and CodeDeploy in the target account?
examScenarios.focus: Cross-account IAM role assumption, KMS key sharing for artifact encryption, CodeDeploy cross-account trust

topics.label: Configuration Management and IaC
topics.description: Implement infrastructure as code using CloudFormation (drift detection, StackSets, nested stacks, custom resources), AWS CDK, Elastic Beanstalk, and Systems Manager (Parameter Store, Patch Manager, Run Command, State Manager, Automation). Understand OpsWorks for configuration management.

examScenarios.title: Multi-Account StackSets Deployment
examScenarios.prompt: An organization wants to deploy a standard VPC configuration across 50 accounts in 3 AWS regions simultaneously. Which CloudFormation feature and permission model should be used?
examScenarios.focus: StackSets with service-managed permissions using AWS Organizations integration for automatic deployment to new accounts

examScenarios.title: CloudFormation Custom Resource
examScenarios.prompt: A CloudFormation stack needs to generate an RSA key pair and store it in Secrets Manager during provisioning. No native resource supports this. How do you implement it?
examScenarios.focus: Custom Resource backed by Lambda function, using cfnresponse module, signaling SUCCESS/FAILED to the pre-signed S3 URL

topics.label: Resilient Cloud Solutions
topics.description: Design highly available, fault-tolerant architectures. Covers Auto Scaling policies (step, target tracking, scheduled), ELB health checks, Route 53 health checks and DNS failover, RDS Multi-AZ failover, Multi-Region active-passive and active-active patterns, chaos engineering, and fault isolation boundaries.

studyPointers.label: Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling User Guide
Amazon Route 53 Health Checks and DNS Failover

examScenarios.title: Step Scaling vs Target Tracking
examScenarios.prompt: An application experiences sudden traffic spikes lasting 2-3 minutes. Average CPU is normally 40% but spikes to 90%+. Which Auto Scaling policy type responds fastest and why?
examScenarios.focus: Step scaling with aggressive CloudWatch alarms responds faster than target tracking because it does not wait for the metric to stabilize; target tracking has built-in cooldown buffers

examScenarios.title: Active-Active Multi-Region Routing
examScenarios.prompt: A global application requires sub-100ms latency for users in US-East and EU-West, with automatic failover if one region becomes unhealthy. How should Route 53 be configured?
examScenarios.focus: Latency-based routing with health checks on each regional endpoint, failover handled automatically when health check fails

topics.label: Monitoring and Logging
topics.description: Implement comprehensive observability using CloudWatch (metrics, alarms, dashboards, Logs Insights, Contributor Insights, Synthetics), AWS X-Ray distributed tracing, CloudTrail audit logging, AWS Config rules and conformance packs, EventBridge rules, and AWS Health Dashboard.

examScenarios.title: CloudWatch Logs Insights Query
examScenarios.prompt: A team needs to identify the top 10 IP addresses generating 5xx errors in the last hour from ALB access logs stored in CloudWatch Logs. What is the most efficient approach?
examScenarios.focus: CloudWatch Logs Insights with stats count(*) by clientIp, filter @message like /HTTP/5/, sort by count desc, limit 10

examScenarios.title: X-Ray Sampling Rules
examScenarios.prompt: A high-throughput API receives 10,000 requests per second. The team wants to trace all errors but only 1% of successful requests to control costs. How is this configured?
examScenarios.focus: X-Ray sampling rules with reservoir and fixed_rate; custom rule matching on HTTP status codes to apply 100% sampling for errors

topics.label: Incident and Event Response
topics.description: Automate incident detection and remediation using Systems Manager OpsCenter and Incident Manager, EventBridge event patterns, SNS notifications, Lambda-based auto-remediation, runbook automation, and AWS Health events for proactive response.

examScenarios.title: Auto-Remediation Lambda
examScenarios.prompt: When an EC2 instance's CPU alarm fires for 5 minutes, a runbook should automatically restart the instance and notify the on-call team. How do you wire this together with minimal custom code?
examScenarios.focus: CloudWatch alarm → EventBridge rule → Systems Manager Automation document (AWS-RestartEC2Instance) + SNS notification action

examScenarios.title: AWS Health Event Routing
examScenarios.prompt: An organization needs to notify specific team Slack channels when AWS announces scheduled maintenance for EC2 instances they own, across all accounts in an Organization. How is this implemented?
examScenarios.focus: AWS Health events routed through EventBridge in the management account using organizational event bus, forwarded to SNS/Lambda for team routing

topics.label: Security and Compliance
topics.description: Implement security controls using IAM policies, permission boundaries, SCPs, AWS Config compliance rules and conformance packs, Security Hub findings aggregation, GuardDuty threat detection, Inspector vulnerability scanning, Macie data classification, Secrets Manager rotation, and compliance automation.

examScenarios.title: IAM Permission Boundary Delegation
examScenarios.prompt: A platform team wants developers to create IAM roles for their Lambda functions but restrict those roles to only the permissions the developer's team is allowed to have. How do you enforce this without reviewing every role creation?
examScenarios.focus: IAM permission boundaries attached via SCP-enforced condition (iam:PermissionsBoundary), so any role created without the boundary is denied

examScenarios.title: Secrets Manager Auto-Rotation
examScenarios.prompt: An RDS MySQL database password must rotate every 30 days automatically. Application pods read the secret on each connection. How do you implement rotation without application downtime?
examScenarios.focus: Secrets Manager rotation Lambda using the single-user or multi-user rotation strategy; application retrieves secret by name at runtime, not at deploy time
